title: Talasea

{{Quote|True, this isn't exactly Coruscant Rimward. It makes the Outlier worlds look civilized.|[[Mirax Terrik Horn|Mirax Terrik]] to [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]|<ref name="x-wing" />}}
The fourth [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Morobe system]], '''Talasea''' [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] the [[Color/Legends|yellow]] primary [[Star/Legends|star]] in a red/yellow binary group. A [[Temperature/Legends|cool]], [[Water/Legends|moist]], [[Forest/Legends|forested]], and fog-shrouded world, Talasea had a higher [[Gravity/Legends|gravity]] than standard and was lashed by severe thunderstorms during the rainy season. Island continents made up its land masses. Animal life included native [[Insect/Legends|insects]] and [[Reptile/Legends|reptiles]], along with feral [[Mammal/Legends|mammals]] descended from those brought for an early [[Farm/Legends|farming]] colony, including [[Bantha/Legends|banthas]] and [[Rycrit/Legends|rycrits]]. Indigenous [[Plant/Legends|plant]] life included [[green ivy]], [[tendril-moss]], and the [[kaha tree]]. It was the site of several minor conflicts from multiple entities in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

==History==
{{Quote|On Talasea things would mildew from plate to mouth.|Mirax Terrik to Corran Horn|<ref name="Bacta War">''[[X-Wing: The Bacta War]]''</ref>}}
Colonized long ago, most of the settlers' descendants left over the [[Standard year/Legends|years]], and the last group of them were wiped out by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] after the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] for harboring a [[Unidentified Jedi (Talasea)|fugitive]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]].

Some [[7 ABY/Legends|three years]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] was moved from [[Folor]] to Talasea, closer to the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Galactic Core]], as a staging area for their eventual move on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. They made their base on the largest of the island continents, inhabiting the ruins of Talasea's Planetary Governor's Palace and the surrounding ivy-covered cottages. The Palace's primitive Grand Room was built of heavy native wood and thick plaster. After [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] agent [[Kirtan Loor]] deduced the location of Rogue Squadron's new headquarters, [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Devlia]] ordered a platoon of [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] to secretly [[Raid on Talasea|infiltrate]] the base and plant explosives. Though the squadron lost six sentries and [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Lujayne Forge]], all of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] commandos were captured or killed. The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] immediately evacuated the base, leaving behind several booby traps for any Imperial follow-up teams to discover.

A year later, a larger [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] base was established at Talasea, and the recently compromised [[Project Morrt]] was manipulated to set up a trap there for one of [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]]'s [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]]. The Star Destroyer [[Implacable (Star Destroyer)/Legends|''Implacable'']] escaped, but its escorts ''[[Provocateur]]'' and ''[[Constrictor]]'' were defeated in the [[Battle of Talasea]].
